name: James Hardie Industries plc
description: James Hardie Industries plc is a global leader in the manufacturing of fiber cement and fiber gypsum building solutions. Headquartered in Ireland, the company specializes in high-performance building materials, including siding, backer boards, and interior wall systems. With a strong presence in North America, the Asia Pacific region, and Europe, James Hardie is recognized for its innovation in durable, fire-resistant, and weather-resistant construction products that serve both residential and commercial markets worldwide.
